about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Biography & Expertise
about.bio: I am a Senior Frontend Engineer with over 6 years of experience specializing in building beautiful, highly interactive web applications. I focus on pixel-perfect details, immersive animations, and clean architectures that deliver world-class user experiences.

exp1.description: Led development of highly animated React applications, designing state-of-the-art interactive dashboards and custom UI frameworks.

exp2.description: Created premium, glassmorphic customer landing pages with responsive animations and state management stores.

exp3.description: Designed and built clean, modular websites for client startups. Focused on SEO, accessibility, and high performance.

project1.title: Nova SaaS Dashboard
project1.description: A modern, high-performance analytic dashboard featuring dynamic charts, glassmorphic layout, and live data telemetry streams.

project2.title: Aether Crypto Terminal
project2.description: Real-time cryptocurrency tracking platform featuring smooth dark luxury animations, customized theme selectors, and state management.

test1.name: Sarah Connor
test1.comment: Angla is an absolute wizard! The landing page is incredibly premium, responsive, and was built ahead of schedule. Highly recommended!

test2.name: David Miller
test2.comment: Working with Angla was an absolute pleasure. The design aesthetics and attention to detail are on another level.
